title: Canada's deficit lower than expected thanks to higher oil prices
description: The government says Canada's debt is 14% lower than projected earlier, with savings being used to justify billions in new spending.
content:
Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has unveiled a lower government deficit than expected, thanks to a surge in oil prices and signs of resiliency in the economy despite tariff threats and geopolitical uncertainty.

title: Indian billionaire heir offers to save 80 of Pablo Escobar’s ‘cocaine hippos’ from Colombian cull
description: Indian magnate Anant Ambani, son of billionaire Mukesh Ambani, has offered to take in at his wildlife sanctuary in India, 80 “cocaine hippos” currently living in Colombia, where the government is planning to cull them.
content:

title: German tourist dies after cobra bites him during Egypt snake show
description: German tourist dies after a venomous cobra reportedly slithered into his pants and bit him during a snake charmer performance in Hurghada, Egypt, Bavarian police said.
content:
A German tourist has died after a venomous cobra featured in a snake show reportedly slithered up his pants and bit him on the leg, authorities said.
The freak accident occurred early April at a luxury resort destination in Egypt, according to the Ba... [1825 chars]

title: Prime Minister Mark Carney Says Canada’s Economy Is Expected to Grow and Deficit to Fall
description: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s budget update keeps to his path of diversifying away from the United States.
content: Prime Minister Mark Carney of Canada presented a budget update on Tuesday showing that his government’s deficit would be less than projected last fall and that the country’s economy would most likely grow over the coming year despite several key indu... [1914 chars]

title: First full gas tanker exits Strait of Hormuz since Iran war began
description: A gas tanker passed through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, the first shipment to successfully exit the Persian Gulf since the start of the war with Iran.
content:
A tanker ship passed through the Strait of Hormuz headed for China on Monday — the first shipment of natural gas to successfully exit the Persian Gulf since the start of the war with Iran.

title: Britain Summons Iran’s Ambassador Over Message to Iranians in U.K.
description: Iran’s embassy in London posted a message on social media inviting Iranians living in Britain to register for a ‘Sacrifice for the Homeland’ campaign.
content:
The British government said Tuesday that it had summoned the Iranian ambassador in response to what it called “unacceptable and inflammatory comments” posted by the Iranian Embassy on social media.

description: Hospital CEOs came under fire at a House hearing Tuesday, with Republicans accusing them of overcharging patients and exploiting the system
content:

title: A pin worn by Venezuela’s acting President has sparked an international row
description: Venezuela’s acting President Delcy Rodríguez wore the pin when she visited Barbados on Monday
content: Guyana has formally complained to Caribbean leaders after Venezuela’s acting President Delcy Rodríguez was seen wearing a controversial pin during official visits. The emblem depicts a map of Guyana’s western region, which Venezuela has long claimed ... [2220 chars]

description: The Arab oil producer has long expressed frustration with the quotas it has to follow as part of OPEC, the cartel of major state-owned oil producers.
content:

description: Suleman Dawood, 19, and Shahzada Dawood, 48, died in the Titan submersible disaster in 2023
content:
